description_long: This is a cubic wooden storage box with a realistic plank texture, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. Two sides of the box are marked with a prominent black caduceus symbol, commonly associated with medical or emergency supplies, while another side features a large red cross, further emphasizing its medical theme. The wood grain is visible and detailed, with vertical planks and natural imperfections, suggesting durability and outdoor suitability. The top of the box is flat and unadorned except for the continuation of the wood texture and a partial caduceus symbol. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, indicating a simple construction. The box appears solid and robust, suitable for use in urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or parks for secure storage or emergency supply purposes.
description: A cubic wooden storage box with medical symbols (caduceus and red cross) on its sides, featuring a realistic plank texture and a sturdy, rustic design.
description_view_0: This view shows the wooden box with a large red cross on one side, highlighting its medical or emergency use.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the box with a prominent black caduceus symbol centered on the wooden planks.
description_view_2: This view also features the caduceus symbol, but the angle reveals more of the wood grain and texture details.
description_view_3: This view shows a plain wooden side with part of the red cross visible on the lower right, and the top edge of the caduceus symbol at the top.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: painted caduceus symbol and red cross
